25038.name: Broken Trap
descriptionLines: A trap used to capture wild animals, but it was destroyed.
(Will be deleted after the event ends)

25039.name: Capture Trap
descriptionLines: A trap used to capture wild animals.
(Will be deleted after the event ends)

25040.name: Piece of Knowledge
descriptionLines: A piece of knowledge gained em reading the Book of Wisdom.
I feel like I have a glimpse of a part of the world.
^000088This item can use the services of the NPC "Librarian Hahn" on the 2nd floor of the lounge or the "Lounge Transferee" in each city.
^FF0000This item can only be sold to NPCs e moved to storage.^000000

25041.name: Soul Plunger
descriptionLines: A tool that can create a socket on Equipamento para Cabeça. disappear after 1 time use.
Sigrun's Wings, Robo Eye, Angel Spirit, Binoculars,
Alarm Mask, Opera Phantom Mask, Geek Glasses, Machoman's Glasses,
Ears of Ifrit, Chick Hat, Gigantic Majestic Goat, Spirit of Green Maiden,
Butterfly Mask, Shadow Booster, Fallen Angel Blessing, Elemental Crown,
Rabbit Magic Hat, Anubis Helm, New Wave Sunglasses.
The success rate is 25%, if fail the item will vanish.
^ff0000Attention! Any upgrade will be reset to zero if the socket process is success.^000000

25042.name: Piece of Mysterious Egg
descriptionLines: Piece of unidentified egg. If you collect e bring this to certain person, he can make them into a complete egg.

25043.name: Flauta de Raízes
descriptionLines: Uma flauta feita a partir de raizes. Dizem que era portada por palhaços que contavam piadas muito ruins.

25044.name: Raiz Grossa
descriptionLines: Uma raiz grossa e dura. Ela também tem alguns espinhos, então cuidado pra não se machucar!

25045.name: Tecido Peculiar
descriptionLines: Um retalho de um tecido sedoso e único

25046.name: Passe de Embarque
descriptionLines: O Passe de Embarque para você embarcar no Conchiolina, o barco que faz a viagem de Lasagna a Rune-Midgard. Se você já tem o seu, significa que já tem a experiência para viajar mundo afora!

25047.name: Kaluna
descriptionLines: Uma concha rara encontrada na costa de Lasagna. Tem um cheiro esquisito, mas se preparada direitinho, seu sumo pode ser usado para preparar o famigerado Leite de Kaluna.

25048.name: Marmita Completa
descriptionLines: Uma marmita bem balanceada entre nutrientes, carboidratos, proteínas e fibra. É hora de papar!

25049.name: Concha de Basilisco
descriptionLines: Uma concha que os Basiliscos geralmente carregam como amuleto. Não se sabe de onde veio.

25050.name: RJC Coin
descriptionLines: A gold coin made to commemorate the holding of RJC.
Courage springs up when you grasp it.

^FF0000This item can be used em NPCs "RJC2015 Goodwill Ambassador" e "Jewel" in Izlude from the end of regular maintenance on July 28, 2015 to the start of regular maintenance on November 4, 2015.^000000
^FF0000This item can only be sold to NPCs e moved to storage.^000000

25051.name: Token of Union
descriptionLines: A certified investment slip of Rune Midgard metropolitan. Returning it to the investor will give you a trust from metropolist.

25052.name: Energy <Guardian Dragon>
descriptionLines: em enchanting, you can demonstrate it's original abilities.
Take it to the NPC "Maxwell" in Morocc for a special enchantment.
^FF0000When enchanted, it has the following effects:^000000
Diminui o dano recebido de all elemental attacks em 7%.
^0000FFPara cada nível de refinamento^000000 of equipped ^990099Vestimenta^000000:
Chance aleatória to absorb 1% of the o dano inflicted on the enemy as SP.
The SP absorbtion effect of ^990099Energy <Guardian Dragon>^000000 will not be activated.

25053.name: Energy <Valquíria>
descriptionLines: em enchanting, you can demonstrate it's original abilities.
Take it to the NPC "Maxwell" in Morocc for a special enchantment.
^FF0000When enchanted, it has the following effects:^000000
^0000FFPara cada nível de refinamento^000000 of equipped ^990099Vestimenta^000000:
Reflects 5% of melee physical o dano.
^0000FFPara cada nível de refinamento^000000 of equipped ^990099Vestimenta^000000:
Reflects additional 2% of melee physical o dano.

25054.name: Energy <Gekifu>
descriptionLines: em enchanting, you can demonstrate it's original abilities.

25056.name: Watermelon Heart
descriptionLines: The most central essence of watermelon is said to be the sweetest part.

25057.name: Unknown Cantaloupe
descriptionLines: Mysterious cantaloupe, what kind of melon is unknown?

25058.name: Twinkle Effect(Upper)
descriptionLines: An enchantment stone that can give effect on 4th slot of upper costume equipment.

25059.name: Ghost Effect(Mid)
descriptionLines: An enchantment stone that can give effect on 4th slot of middle costume equipment.

descriptionLines: A stone that raise magic point.

SP Máximo +50, At base Level 120 Aumenta SP Máximo em 2%.

25066.name: Recovery Stone(Lower)
descriptionLines: A stone that can recover all bad states.

25067.name: Cast Stone(Vestimenta)
descriptionLines: A stone that can Reduces o Tempo de Conjuração Fixa.
Adds enchantment on Vestimenta slot costume.
Diminui o Tempo de Conjuração Fixa de todas as habilidades em 0.5 segundo.

25068.name: Velocidade de Ataque Stone(Upper)
descriptionLines: A stone that can Aumenta Velocidade de Ataque.
Adds enchantment on upper slot costume.

25072.name: Kyrie Stone(Lower)
descriptionLines: A stone blessed with kyrie eleison.
Adds enchantment on lower slot costume.
Permite o uso do nível 1 ^0000FFKyrie Eleison^000000.

25073.name: Old Papyrus
descriptionLines: Ancient documents owned em Sphinx's Feiticeira, Marduk. An ancient ritual information written on it.

25074.name: Old Coin
descriptionLines: An old coin that once used as currency in the past. Can be found in ancient ruin e ancient tomb. It has now great value because of its material.

25075.name: Admiral's Sword
descriptionLines: An old sword of navi admiral of Rune Midgard kingdom. This sword was rusted because has been abeoned for a long time.

25076.name: Coursera
descriptionLines: A special herb that only grow in deep cave. Can be obtained from Comodo cave. It has unique fragrance due the effect of witch that being sealed on it.

25077.name: Knight Supply
descriptionLines: A box containing supply for prontera knight. Contains simple first aid kit tools e remedies.

25078.name: Ha Soju
descriptionLines: A soju created through summer flower traditional technique. You can feel floral scent from it.

25079.name: Last Breath
descriptionLines: The last breath of the soul. It is likely that it will freeze if it is wrapped in cold air e it does not touch well.

25080.name: Fox Bead
descriptionLines: A bead that give warm e powerful feeling. With the fox's steam, you can feel the grudge.

25081.name: Special Quest Shiitake
descriptionLines: It seems necessary to perform quests in the game of "Ragnarok Online".
^000088Take it to the NPC "Forin" in Prontera, the capital of the Kingdom of Rune Midgards.^000000
FF0000This item will be available until October 6, 2015 (TuesDia), when regular maintenance starts.^000000
^FF0000This item can only be sold to NPCs e moved to storage.^000000

25082.name: Hero Power Crystal
descriptionLines: It seems that the lost hero power can be recovered.
^FF0000This item can only be sold to NPCs e moved to storage.^000000

25083.name: Silky Hair of Rabbit
descriptionLines: A soft hair of runaway rabbit. Can be used as material of hat. Wildlife conservation society people like it.

25084.name: Captured Rabbit
descriptionLines: It's still alive so please hele it with care.

25085.name: Rabbit's Hair
descriptionLines: A hair of rabbit. Can be used as material of hat?Wildlife conservation society people like it.

25086.name: Ribbon for Gift wrapping
descriptionLines: Magic ribbon used to wrap gifts in Lutie. Don't use it on light weight gift or you will be in trouble.

25087.name: Old Doll
descriptionLines: An old doll with burned hes. It is treasured e well maintained.

25088.name: Dream Fragment
descriptionLines: A piece of dream that can be obtained from someone's dreams.

25089.name: Ornament Wings Gift
descriptionLines: An ornament wings that used on gift in Lutie. Don't use it on light weight gift or you will be in trouble.

25090.name: Mana Fragment <Kuren>
descriptionLines: A mysterious piece that has a slight sign of fire.

25097.name: LoVA Collaboration Ticket
descriptionLines: Tickets required to perform the exclusive quest for "LORD of VERMILION ARENA Collaboration".
^000088Take it to the NPC "Dux Tier" in the middle of time.^000000

25124.name: Cursed Fragment
descriptionLines: A cursed shard infused with Demon King Baphomet's magic power

25125.name: Cursed Proof of the Orc Hero
25125.unidentifiedName: Cursed Proof of the Orc Hero
descriptionLines: A cursed proof that seals the power of a crashed Orc Hero.

25126.name: Orc Magic Crystal
descriptionLines: A stone that a shrine maiden once planted in the body of Orcs to brainwash them.

25131.name: Energia Triste
descriptionLines: Esta parece deixar o ambiente triste.

25132.name: Abóbora de Decoração
descriptionLines: Uma decoração que representa o Dia das Bruxas.
Você pode sentir melhor o espírito deste dia se acender a vela dentro.

25134.name: Garden Tour Lottery
descriptionLines: ^FF0000This item cannot be traded with other accounts.^000000
Lottery tickets won em participating in the garden.

25135.name: Spiritual Auger
descriptionLines: A socket tool that can create a slot on equipment.

25136.name: Electric Effect(Mid)
descriptionLines: Gives enhancement to middle costume slot.

25137.name: Green Flare Effect(Lower)
descriptionLines: Gives enhancement to lower costume slot.

25138.name: Shrink Effect(Mid)
descriptionLines: Gives enhancement to middle costume slot.
Effect does not apply on PVP e WOE area.

25139.name: Item Appraisal Stone(Lower)
descriptionLines: Give enhancement on lower costume equipment slots.
Permite o uso do nível 1 ^0000FFItem Appraisal^000000

25140.name: Resurrection Stone(Lower)
descriptionLines: Give enhancement on lower costume equipment slots.

25141.name: Exp Stone(Mid)
descriptionLines: A stone that can Aumenta experience gain when defeating monster.
Give enhancement on middle costume equipment slots.

25142.name: Emblema Doram
descriptionLines: Uma moeda de troca para obter equipamentos e acessórios valiosos.
Acumule muitos para conseguir o melhores itens!

25143.name: Pelúcia de Coelhinho
descriptionLines: Apesar de lembrar o Coelhinho da Páscoa, na verdade é um ótimo presente de Natal.

25144.name: Boneca Fofura Contorcionista
descriptionLines: Ahaha, não, não, essa boneca não tá preciseo de um exorcismo não! Ela só está fazendo exercício. É que ela é meio encapetada, pode dormir tranquilo. Hu hu hu...

25145.name: Bonequinho Faminto
descriptionLines: Apesar dos pesares, e deste estranho bonequinho de pelúcia ter sido feito em homenagem a um pequeno demônio carregado de pesar, você tem que concordar que ele parece muito fofinho!

25146.name: Bonequinha da Jirtas
descriptionLines: Essa é a adorável Jirtas Torturadora, a boneca favorita dos Injustiçados! Tem até uma musiquinha tema: “Lá-lé-li-ló-Jirtas Torturadora, Lá-lé-li-ló-Jirtas Torturadora!”. Sim, a própria música é tão ruim que é uma tortura...

25147.name: Pelúcia de Coelhinho Darko
descriptionLines: Muito mais fofinho que o Coelhinho da Páscoa é esse adorável coelhinho chamado Donnie! Olha para esses olhinhos vermelhos, esse sorriso macabro e essas garras cobertas de... katchup! Não dá vontade de abraçar?

25148.name: Boneca Queimada da Baba Yaga
descriptionLines: Essa boneca carrega um forte cheiro de madeira queimada e está toda suja de fuligem. Nem pense em tirar foto dela com uma câmera obscura se você ainda quer dormir essa noite...

25149.name: Barbe Jogo da Forca
descriptionLines: Sua coleção de Barbes de Pano nunca estará completa sem essa Barbe Jogo da Forca! Acompanha como acessórios um bloquinho de notas pra você tentar adivinhar as palavras e uma corda de com nó de marinheiro pra dar cabo dos perdedores!

25150.name: Travesseiro Moe da Alice
descriptionLines: Esse Dakimakura é o presente perfeito para qualquer otaku que concorda que a Alice é personagem mais kawaii desu do Ragnarök Online! Ahh, o que você não daria para ser notado pela verdadeira Alice e fazer dela sua waifu!

25151.name: Rachel's Revólver
descriptionLines: A Revólver repaired em Rachel. It's not recommended to be used as weapon.

25152.name: Tribute Bouquet
descriptionLines: A tribute bouquet to dearest person that has passed away.

25153.name: Broken Gun Scrap
descriptionLines: A scrap of broken gun. You can repair it if you take it to an expert. Let's deal with it carefully.

25154.name: Old Gun Powder
descriptionLines: A bunch of old gun powder which can be found scattred on ground.

25155.name: Prova de Honra de Schwartzvald
descriptionLines: Um Símbolo de Honra especial de Schwartzvald.

25156.name: Chimera Sculpture
descriptionLines: Can be sold to item collector.

25157.name: Deciduous Branch
descriptionLines: Can be sold to item collector.

25158.name: Jelly Core
descriptionLines: Can be sold to item collector.

25159.name: Seal of Heart Hunter
descriptionLines: A seal with symbol of Heart Hunter organization.

25160.name: Borrowed Book
descriptionLines: You should return it to its owner.

25161.name: Homemade Cookie
descriptionLines: It was made em apprentice chef, but it's quite delicious.

25162.name: Anchovy Cookie
descriptionLines: A well dried e crispy Anchovy cookie. It's the best snack for cat, but not for human.

25163.name: Arms Shop Flyer
descriptionLines: An ad flyer of "Clana Nemieri" arms shop written on it.

25164.name: Fresh Tea Leaf
descriptionLines: You can make a fine tea from this leaf with a secret recipe.

25165.name: Fine Tea
descriptionLines: The finest tea processed from a secret recipe.

25166.name: Shiny Ring
descriptionLines: Crafted from gold, with Ruem attached on it, very classy yet elegance.
It's really fit on finger, but you decide to use it as a decoration instead...

25167.name: Old Letter
descriptionLines: An old letter that has been abeoned for decades.
It's too worn out, it makes harder to read any words on it. Looks like written em a teenager.

25168.name: Art Medal
descriptionLines: Medals won em participating in art festivals

25169.name: Gelatina Pegajosa
descriptionLines: Gelatina muito pegajosa que pode ser obtida derroteo o Polvo Rei e o Tentáculo de Polvo.
É utilizada como material principal para criar a máscara utilizada no Festival do Polvo.
^000088Ao termino do evento o item desaparecerá^000000

25170.name: Minor Cast Stone(Vestimenta)
descriptionLines: Diminui o Tempo de Conjuração Fixa de todas as habilidades em 0.3 segundos.
Gives ability when compounded on Vestimenta costume slot.

25171.name: Experience Stone(Upper)
descriptionLines: Aumenta experience gained from defeating a monsters em 2%.
Gives ability when compounded on upper slot costume.
Experience Stone SET (Upper, Meio e Lower), Aumenta experience gained from defeating a monsters em 3%.

25172.name: Variable Cast Stone(Upper)
descriptionLines: Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 3%.
Gives ability when compounded on upper slot costume.
Variable Cast Stone SET (Upper, Meio e Lower), Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 6%.

descriptionLines: Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 3%.

25174.name: Variable Cast Stone(Lower)
descriptionLines: Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 3%.

25175.name: Lex Aeterna Stone(Mid)
descriptionLines: Chance aleatória de conjurar automaticamente Level 1 ^009900Lex Aeterna^000000 ao causar dano físico.
Gives ability when compounded on middle slot costume.

25176.name: Blue Aura Effect(Mid)
descriptionLines: Gives Blue Aura effect when compounded on costume's 4th slot.

25177.name: Shadow Effect(Mid)
descriptionLines: Gives Shadow effect when compounded on costume's 4th slot.
Has no effect in PvP e WoE areas.

25178.name: Pink Glow Effect(Mid)
descriptionLines: Gives Pink Glow effect when compounded on costume's 4th slot.

25179.name: Star of Blessing
descriptionLines: A little gem engraved with royal family of Prontera kingdom "Tera Gloria" symbol.
It was made from the piece of Heart of Ymir e used in blessing ceremony 'Star of Blessing'.

25180.name: A pair of Old Rings
descriptionLines: A pair of rings made from scrap metal. It seemseach ring has size that suit for a man e a woman.

25181.name: Wooden Rosary
descriptionLines: A crude rosary made from wood.

25182.name: Mercenário Dagger with Glyph
descriptionLines: A small Mercenário dagger with engraved mark. It seems has been used for a very long time.

25183.name: Bow Thimble Decoration
descriptionLines: A small accessory for bow that attached on the edge of bow. It has an old shimmering gemstone.

25184.name: Portable Sewing Kit
descriptionLines: It seems has been treasured for a long time. This leather case contain some needles, thread e buttons.

25185.name: Locket Pendant
descriptionLines: An old pendant. It has portrait of man e woman.

25186.name: Clover Synthetic Roll
descriptionLines: Can replace the synthetic scroll of the clover necklace.

25187.name: Projétil Pesado
descriptionLines: Um projétil tão caro e pesado que você vai ficar se pergunteo do que ele é feito.
^0000ffCatalisador de [Calibre Letal], não é necessário equipar.^000000

25188.name: Girl's Hekerchief
descriptionLines: Sohee's Hekerchief. It's gives pleasant feeling when you touch it.

28505.name: Anel do Capiroto

O que, devo dizer, não foi nada inteligente da sua parte. Será que você nunca ouviu falar da história do Pedro Parque, que fez um pacto com Nephisto para salvar a vida da sua tia velhinha? Ok, a tia dele até que foi ficeo cada vez mais jovem, mas o preço pra isso foi acabar com o casamento do Pedro com a bela Maria Joana. Eu gostava da Maria Joana... maldito Nephisto.
